items.name: blur-reveal
items.title: Blur Reveal
items.description: Text fades in from a heavy blur into sharp focus.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Character-by-character text reveal with a deterministic blinking cursor.

items.name: inline-highlight
items.title: Inline Highlight
items.description: Animates one word inside a sentence from a base color to a brand color.

items.name: strikethrough-replace
items.title: Strikethrough Replace
items.description: Draws a strike line across old text then reveals new text in its place.

items.name: staggered-fade-up
items.title: Staggered Fade Up
items.description: Words fade in and slide up one after another with a configurable delay.

items.name: masked-slide-reveal
items.title: Masked Slide Reveal
items.description: Words slide up out of an invisible horizontal mask, one after another.

items.name: tracking-in
items.title: Tracking In
items.description: Letter-spacing collapses and blur clears with a springy motion.

items.name: shimmer-sweep
items.title: Shimmer Sweep
items.description: Light shine sweeps across muted text via background-clip:text.

items.name: marker-highlight
items.title: Marker Highlight
items.description: Colored marker block draws behind a phrase as the text color shifts.

items.name: slot-machine-roll
items.title: Slot Machine Roll
items.description: Vertical reel scrolls characters from one value to another.

items.name: matrix-decode
items.title: Matrix Decode
items.description: Random scramble resolves left-to-right into the target text.

items.name: rgb-glitch-text
items.title: RGB Glitch Text
items.description: Three RGB-offset text copies jitter for a brief glitch window.

items.name: infinite-marquee
items.title: Infinite Marquee
items.description: Seamlessly looping horizontal text strip with optional stroke style.

items.name: mesh-gradient-bg
items.title: Mesh Gradient Background
items.description: Living gradient with amorphous color blobs slowly drifting across the frame.

items.name: dynamic-grid
items.title: Dynamic Grid
items.description: Subtle moving grid background with configurable cell size and direction.

items.name: spring-pop-in
items.title: Spring Pop In
items.description: Elastic spring-driven scale-in wrapper for any child element.

items.name: simulated-cursor
items.title: Simulated Cursor
items.description: Animated mouse cursor moving between waypoints with click ripple feedback.

items.name: directional-wipe
items.title: Directional Wipe
items.description: Slide one scene in while pushing the other out.

items.name: device-mockup-zoom
items.title: Device Mockup Zoom
items.description: Pull back from a UI to reveal it inside a device frame.

items.name: zoom-through-transition
items.title: Zoom Through Transition
items.description: Aggressively scale into the center of an element.

items.name: chat-to-preview-layout
items.title: Chat to Preview Layout
items.description: Two-column layout where chat shrinks and preview expands.

items.name: bounding-box-selector
items.title: Bounding Box Selector
items.description: Figma-style selection rectangle appears around any element.

items.name: animated-line-chart
items.title: Animated Line Chart
items.description: Line chart whose SVG path draws on from left to right with a leading dot.

items.name: animated-bar-chart
items.title: Animated Bar Chart
items.description: Bars spring up from the baseline in a staggered cascade.

items.name: terminal-simulator
items.title: Terminal Simulator
items.description: Terminal window that types out commands and rolls old lines off the top.

items.name: code-diff-wipe
items.title: Code Diff Wipe
items.description: Before/after code reveal via clip-path wipe with a handle marker.

items.name: toast-notification
items.title: Toast Notification
items.description: System-style toast pops in, holds, then slides out.

items.name: drag-and-drop-flow
items.title: Drag and Drop Flow
items.description: Simulated file drag into a dropzone followed by upload progress.

items.name: progress-steps
items.title: Progress Steps
items.description: Multi-step pipeline with sequentially activating nodes and filling lines.

items.name: data-flow-pipes
items.title: Data Flow Pipes
items.description: Glowing data packets travel along SVG bezier pipes between system nodes, leaving fading trails.

items.name: code-accordion
items.title: Code Accordion
items.description: A code window that springs a range of lines closed and replaces them with a "N lines collapsed" placeholder.

items.name: glass-code-block
items.title: Glass Code Block
items.description: A premium frosted-glass code editor window with a regex tokenizer and line-by-line stagger reveal.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: A card with a moonlight-cool radial spotlight that follows a synthetic cursor and lights up its microborder.

items.name: perspective-marquee
items.title: Perspective Marquee
items.description: A 3D-tilted infinite marquee with depth-of-field blur on items rolling toward the horizon.

items.name: success-confetti
items.title: Success Confetti
items.description: Deterministic seeded confetti burst with optional headline.

items.name: frosted-glass-wipe
items.title: Frosted Glass Wipe
items.description: Elegant scene transition through a sliding pane of frosted glass.

items.name: kinetic-type-mask
items.title: Kinetic Type Mask
items.description: Use giant typography as a window into the next scene.

items.name: spatial-push
items.title: Spatial Push
items.description: A new scene physically presses the old one back into the frame.

items.name: grid-pixelate-wipe
items.title: Grid Pixelate Wipe
items.description: Dissolve from one scene to the next through a deterministic grid of mask cells.

items.name: chromatic-aberration-wipe
items.title: Chromatic Aberration Wipe
items.description: An ultra-fast slide transition with an RGB glitch on the peak frames.

items.name: hero-device-assemble
items.title: Hero Device Assemble
items.description: Floating device layers spring together into a laptop or phone mockup, then the screen wakes with a shimmer.

items.name: ecosystem-constellation
items.title: Ecosystem Constellation
items.description: A central logo orbited by integration satellites with pulsing data lines.

items.name: ai-generation-canvas
items.title: AI Generation Canvas
items.description: A prompt input transforms into a header, then a skeleton dashboard flips into populated cards.

items.name: live-code-compilation
items.title: Live Code Compilation
items.description: Split-screen where typed code on the left snaps a live UI preview on the right, HMR-style.

items.name: landing-code-showcase
items.title: Landing Code Showcase
items.description: Magical split-screen: code types itself on the left while the preview reactively re-renders on the right with sparks and tactile bounce.

items.name: dashboard-populate
items.title: Dashboard Populate
items.description: An empty dashboard cascades to life with KPI count-ups, bar bounces, line traces, and a donut fill.

items.name: terminal-to-browser-deploy
items.title: Terminal to Browser Deploy
items.description: A CLI deploy completes, the terminal blurs back, and a browser window springs from the deploy URL.

items.name: browser-flow
items.title: Browser Flow
items.description: Full Safari/Chrome simulation: typed URL, progress bar, page render, scroll, and a virtual cursor click.

items.name: pricing-tier-focus
items.title: Pricing Tier Focus
items.description: Three pricing cards where the focused tier rises and brightens while siblings dim and blur.

items.name: infinite-bento-pan
items.title: Infinite Bento Pan
items.description: A camera diagonally drifts across an oversized bento grid behind a soft vignette.

items.name: tool-menu-slide-in
items.title: Tool Menu Slide In
items.description: A glass tool palette whips up from below the editor canvas while its icons pop in with a stagger.

items.name: image-expand-to-fullscreen
items.title: Image Expand To Fullscreen
items.description: An image lifts out of a feed post and morphs into a fullscreen editor with toolbars sliding in.

items.name: github-stars
items.title: GitHub Stars
items.description: Inertial fly-through of a repo's stargazers with a synced count-up odometer that locks on the total. Horizontal 16:9 or vertical 9:16.

items.name: remocn-ui
items.title: remocn UI Core
items.description: Shared timeline-fold hook, theme context, and color math for remocn UI primitives.

items.name: spinner
items.title: UI Spinner
items.description: A deterministic spinning arc that loops on the Remotion frame — a pure motion atom with no state.

items.name: button
items.title: UI Button
items.description: A button whose idle/hover/press/loading/success state is a pure function of the timeline; the loading state composes the Spinner motion atom.

items.name: accordion
items.title: UI Accordion
items.description: A disclosure whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel reveal, chevron, and background are keyframed presets.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: UI Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal alert dialog whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and popup zoom are keyframed presets. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: dialog
items.title: UI Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and popup zoom are keyframed presets, with a close button and a primary action. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: sheet
items.title: UI Sheet
items.description: A side panel whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and right-edge slide-in are keyframed presets, with a close button and a primary action. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: drawer
items.title: UI Drawer
items.description: A bottom panel whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and bottom-edge slide-up are keyframed presets, with a drag handle and a primary action. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: checkbox
items.title: UI Checkbox
items.description: A checkbox whose checked/unchecked state is a pure function of the timeline; the box fill, border, and checkmark draw are keyframed presets.

items.name: radio
items.title: UI Radio
items.description: A radio whose checked/unchecked state is a pure function of the timeline; the ring border and inner dot pop are keyframed presets.

items.name: switch
items.title: UI Switch
items.description: A switch whose checked/unchecked state is a pure function of the timeline; the track fill and sliding thumb are keyframed presets.

items.name: input
items.title: UI Input
items.description: A text input whose idle/hover/active/typing/invalid state is a pure function of the timeline; the focus ring, border, caret, and value reveal are keyframed presets.

items.name: blur-in
items.title: UI Blur In
items.description: A wrapper that reveals a single child with blur + opacity + a directional offset; a pure state atom, theme-independent — its context is a motion config (blur/distance/axis), not a theme.

items.name: field
items.title: UI Field
items.description: A static layout family for composing labeled form controls, modeled on shadcn's Field: FieldGroup ▸ Field ▸ FieldLabel / FieldControl / FieldDescription. Reads no frame and holds no state — colors come from the resolved theme. FieldControl is a relative fixed-height slot for the absolute remocn-ui controls (Input, Button).

items.name: select-item
items.title: UI Select Item
items.description: A select option row whose idle/hover/press/selected state is a pure function of the timeline; the row background, label color, and check icon are keyframed presets. Composed inside the Select panel.

items.name: select
items.title: UI Select
items.description: A select whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the trigger reuses the Button primitive and the reveal panel composes SelectItem rows. The panel fade, scale, lift, and chevron are keyframed presets.

items.name: dropdown-menu-item
items.title: UI Dropdown Menu Item
items.description: A dropdown menu action row whose idle/hover/press state is a pure function of the timeline; the row background and label color are keyframed presets. Composed inside the DropdownMenu panel.

items.name: tabs
items.title: UI Tabs
items.description: A tabs widget whose active-tab state is a pure function of the timeline; the sliding indicator, label colors, and panel crossfade are keyframed/derived presets.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: UI Dropdown Menu
items.description: A dropdown menu whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the trigger reuses the Button primitive and the reveal panel composes DropdownMenuItem rows. The panel fade, scale, lift, and chevron are keyframed presets.

items.name: cursor
items.title: UI Cursor
items.description: An animated cursor that moves between waypoints, clicks (ripple), and drags. The Cursor renderer is a pure function of a numeric CursorStyle channel; useCursorPath reads the frame and eases the path, ripple, and press phases.

items.name: toast
items.title: UI Toast
items.description: A toast notification whose hidden/visible state is a pure function of the timeline. The Toast renderer is a pure function of a ToastStyle (opacity, translateY, scale); useToastTransition eases both the slide-in enter and the auto-dismiss exit. Variants default/success/error change the leading icon and its color.

items.name: command-menu-item
items.title: UI Command Menu Item
items.description: A command-palette row whose idle/hover/press/selected state is a pure function of the timeline. Leading icon + label + trailing shortcut kbd. Exports an inline CommandMenuItemRow (reused by CommandMenu) and a standalone CommandMenuItem atom; the row background, label color, and icon color are keyframed presets.

items.name: command-menu
items.title: UI Command Menu
items.description: A ⌘K command palette whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel zoom + backdrop dim are dialog-like keyframed presets. The search row reveals the typed query, the list is filtered by a pure case-insensitive substring on the visible query prefix, and rows reuse the CommandMenuItem row.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: UI Tooltip
items.description: A tooltip whose hidden/visible state is a pure function of the timeline. The Tooltip renderer is a pure function of a TooltipStyle (opacity, scale, translate); useTooltipTransition eases both the show and the hide. The static `side` prop sets the enter translate axis and the arrow placement.

items.name: progress
items.title: UI Progress
items.description: A progress bar whose fill is a pure function of a numeric value channel (value-channel deviation). The Progress renderer takes a clamped 0–100 value; useProgressTransition reads the frame and eases the fill between value steps. Muted track + primary indicator, optional floored percentage label.

items.name: skeleton-block
items.title: UI Skeleton Block
items.description: A shimmer placeholder block — a motion atom (spinner pattern). A directional highlight gradient sweeps across deterministically from useCurrentFrame() and loops seamlessly. Configurable width/height/radius/speed and base/highlight colors.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: UI Skeleton
items.description: A skeleton→content crossfade whose loading/loaded state is a pure function of the timeline. The Skeleton renderer is pure (reads no frame); only the composed SkeletonBlock shimmer reads it. SkeletonStyle opacities sum to 1 so the box never dims; real children sit in normal flow and the placeholder (a lines/card layout or a custom node) is an absolute overlay.

items.name: slider
items.title: UI Slider
items.description: A slider whose fill is a numeric value channel plus a thumb idle/hover/press channel (dual-channel value-channel deviation). The Slider renderer is pure (clamped 0–100 value, thumb scale, grab-ring opacity); useSliderTransition reads the frame and eases both channels — value as a numeric lerp, the thumb visual from its state presets. Muted track + primary range + bordered thumb with a derived grab ring.

items.name: combobox
items.title: UI Combobox
items.description: A combobox whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel fade/scale/lift are keyframed presets like select. The trigger reuses the Input presets (typed query + caret reveal via an injected inputStyle), the list is filtered by a pure case-insensitive substring on the visible query prefix, and rows reuse the SelectItem row.

items.name: popover
items.title: UI Popover
items.description: A popover/hover-card whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline. The Popover renderer is a pure function of a PopoverStyle (opacity, scale, translate); usePopoverTransition eases both the open and the close. The static `side` prop sets the enter translate axis; renders title + description and/or arbitrary children in a popover card.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: UI Context Menu
items.description: A right-click context menu whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel scales from its top-left corner (the click point) with a fade + lift. No trigger — the caller positions it. Rows reuse the DropdownMenuItem row; items are plain string labels.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: UI Toggle Group
items.description: A segmented control whose active value is a pure function of the timeline; a raised thumb SLIDES between segments (position + width derived from a float indicator offset, no jumps) and the labels crossfade color via mixOklch. The tabs precedent without content panels.

items.name: stepper
items.title: UI Stepper
items.description: A horizontal onboarding stepper whose progress is a pure function of a continuous step index (value-channel deviation). Every circle (fill, number, stroke-dash check) and connector (primary fill fraction) derives purely from the float position; useStepperTransition reads the frame and eases position between step indices.

items.name: resizable
items.title: UI Resizable
items.description: Two panels split by a draggable handle, where the split ratio is a numeric channel plus a handle idle/hover/press channel (dual-channel value-channel deviation). The Resizable renderer is pure (clamped 0–1 ratio, handle scale, grab-ring opacity); useResizableTransition reads the frame and eases both channels — ratio as a numeric lerp, the handle visual from its state presets. Horizontal and vertical splits; 1px divider + centered grip pill with a derived grab ring.

items.name: signup-flow
items.title: UI Signup Flow
items.description: A signup card composition: a real shadcn-style card (header, labeled Full Name / Email / Password / Confirm fields, primary + Google-outline buttons, sign-in footer) whose cursor fills each field top-to-bottom, then clicks Create account (hover → press → loading → success) as a success toast slides in. A pure orchestrator — every channel comes from a composed primitive's transition hook.

items.name: ai-prompt-flow
items.title: UI AI Prompt Flow
items.description: An AI prompt composition: a prompt types into the field, the Generate button runs hover → press → loading, a skeleton shimmer reveals, then crossfades into the generated answer, and a ready toast slides in. A pure orchestrator — the shimmer is owned by the skeleton-block motion atom; every other channel comes from a composed primitive's hook.

items.name: checkout-flow
items.title: UI Checkout Flow
items.description: A cursor-driven checkout card: the card and its fields blur-in, then the pointer flips a billing-cycle toggle, types a card number, ticks the terms checkbox, and presses Pay through to success, ending in a toast. A pure orchestrator — every channel comes from a composed primitive's transition hook.

items.name: onboarding-stepper-flow
items.title: UI Onboarding Stepper Flow
items.description: A multi-step onboarding composition: a horizontal stepper advances through panels of input, radio, and switch fields, finishing on a Finish button that runs to success. Panel crossfade derives linearly from the stepper's exposed position channel; every other channel comes from a composed primitive's hook.

items.name: settings-toggle-flow
items.title: UI Settings Toggle Flow
items.description: A two-column settings card: the card and its controls blur-in, then the cursor flips a switch, opens a select, drags a labeled slider, and clicks Save, ending in a saved toast. A pure orchestrator — every channel comes from a composed primitive's transition hook.
